properties.description: Dataflow to convert P6 Engineering data with unpivot per date

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Project_code as string,
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Remaining Duration} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Budgeted Labor Units} as string,
		{Actual Labor Units} as string,
		{Remaining Labor Units} as string,
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE} as string,
		Disciplines as string,
		Facility as string,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{Spreadsheet Field} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true) ~> SrcP6EngrManHrs
SrcP6EngrManHrs derive(each(match(!(in(['Project_code','Activity ID','Activity Name','Remaining Duration','Start','Finish','Budgeted Labor Units','Actual Labor Units','Remaining Labor Units','GLOBAL - OFFICE','Disciplines','Facility','GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)','GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)','Spreadsheet Field'],name))), $$ = iif(isNull($$) || !isDecimal($$), '-99', toString($$)))) ~> dcConvertNulltoDummyVal
dcConvertNulltoDummyVal unpivot(output(
		Period as string,
		Units as string
	),
	ungroupBy(Project_code,
		{Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Remaining Duration},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Budgeted Labor Units},
		{Actual Labor Units},
		{Remaining Labor Units},
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE},
		Disciplines,
		Facility,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)},
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)},
		{Spreadsheet Field}),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> UnpivotData
UnpivotData filter(Units != '-99') ~> FltDummyRows
FltDummyRows sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['p6_engr_mhrs.csv'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> SnkP6EngrManHrs
